name: USS Gilmore (DE 18)
events: 11 May 1945 At 1258 K/11, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) exchanged recognition signals with USS Gilmore (Lt. T.F. Meyer, Jr., USNR). At 1330 K/11, rendezvous was made and a medical officer and rating were transferred by the destroyer escort to the submarine. The two ships remained in company during the passage to Saipan. (1)
12 May 1945 Around 1330 K/12, USS Jallao (T/Cdr. J.B. Icenhower, USN) and USS Gilmore (Lt. T.F. Meyer, Jr., USNR) arrived at Saipan. (1)
